summary_text: Detection of a cryptomining file was triggered at 2026-01-31T02:18:00.693Z from the source IP 10.100.20.142 to the destination IP 46.28.69.220, which is associated with the domain grossform.ru. The domain is flagged for phishing and malware drop gate activities. A subsequent HTTP GET flood alert was also generated from the same source IP to the same destination IP shortly after.
